overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a first-person exploration sequence. The player character walks through a neon-lit indoor bar, exits into a rain-slicked futuristic city plaza, and navigates through bustling cyberpunk streets filled with holographic advertisements and towering glass buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk bar lounge with neon advertisements and polished surfaces

events.description: camera turns to focus on large glowing Abydos beverage advertisement screen
turns away from advertisement and walks toward the exit doors

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit bar lounge, examining the interior architecture and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind the counter with arms crossed near the elevator
patron with white hair talking on a phone near the bar entrance

entered.detail: long polished dark counter with neon overhead lighting and reflective surface
glowing billboard displaying Abydos beverage advertisement with stylized woman's face
metal elevator with illuminated cyan frame and call buttons
hanging neon tube lights casting warm ambient glow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a futuristic cyberpunk bar with dark polished surfaces and neon lighting. The camera explores the space, passing by a bartender and a patron on the phone, then focuses on a large glowing advertisement for Abydos beverage before turning toward the exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with wet reflective pavement transitioning from indoor to outdoor

events.description: exits the bar through automatic glass doors into the neon-lit city plaza
ambient lighting shifts from warm interior to cool blue and cyan neon exterior illumination

agents.ego_description: stepping out of the building into the rain-slicked plaza surrounded by towering neon advertisements

entered.detail: automatic glass doors with metal frames marking the building exit
tall building facade covered in massive glowing digital advertisements and corporate logos
tall palm trees lining the plaza edges with uplighting
rain-slicked reflective tile surface mirroring the neon lights above

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the glass exit doors, transitioning from the enclosed bar to the open cyberpunk city plaza. The environment dramatically shifts to a vast outdoor space with wet reflective pavement, towering neon billboards, and palm trees illuminated by the city's glow.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city street with holographic storefronts and pedestrian traffic

events.description: crossing the wet street at a yellow-striped crosswalk with vehicles passing nearby
passing by a pawnshop with illuminated green neon signage
approaching a noodle shop featuring a giant rotating holographic bowl display on the roof

agents.ego_description: navigating the city streets, crossing roads and observing the neon-lit architecture and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shorts and blue jacket walking ahead on the sidewalk
black futuristic car driving past on the wet street

entered.detail: storefront signage with neon green 'PAWN SHOP' letters and striped sphere logo
giant rotating three-dimensional hologram of a noodle bowl with chopsticks on building rooftop
cracked stone building signage with illuminated letters spelling 'augrés'
broad yellow-striped pedestrian crossing on the dark asphalt

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the character through the bustling cyberpunk streets, crossing wet asphalt roads and passing other pedestrians. The camera moves past a neon-lit pawnshop and approaches a distinctive noodle shop crowned with a massive rotating holographic bowl, while towering digital billboards illuminate the rain-slicked environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate, neon-lit interior of a futuristic bar out into a sprawling, rain-slicked cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by gliding through the dark polished surfaces of the bar, passing a bartender and a patron before lingering on a glowing Abydos beverage advertisement. As the camera moves through the glass exit doors, the enclosed space dramatically opens into a vast city plaza characterized by wet reflective pavement, illuminated palm trees, and towering neon billboards. The scene then shifts toward the bustling streets, crossing wet asphalt roads and passing a neon-lit pawnshop. Finally, the camera navigates through the crowd of pedestrians toward a noodle shop crowned by a massive rotating holographic bowl under the glow of towering digital displays.
